mapper.select: /* EtcMapper.selectMemberDtl */ SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId ,MEMBER_NM AS memberNm ,MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail ,MEMBER_BRTHDY AS memberBrthdy ,MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone ,MEMBER_POST AS memberPost ,MEMBER_ADDR AS memberAddr ,MEMBER_ADDR_DETL AS memberAddrDetl FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
